findings.finding: Top Immediate Next Action still says to stop eye-family mask generation/generated-output proof for eyebrows and pupils/iris/sclera from the 2026-07-07T23:06:33-05:00 diagnostic, while later entries record repaired eyebrow and pupils/iris/sclera generated-output proofs on 2026-07-08.
findings.impact: A resumed autonomous session may restart from the older blanket stop instruction instead of the latest row-specific hard-gate state.
findings.recommended_action: Refresh the top hydration summary so it distinguishes still-blocked old/current eye-family masks from later source-repaired local-output evidence, while preserving that rows remain unpromoted until hard-gate proof.

findings.finding: Plan/PROJECT_MANIFEST.json still carries legacy wave_current/latest_wave metadata from Wave25/Wave34 while also carrying Wave70 and deferred Waves71-76 extensions.
findings.impact: The root manifest and Items/Tracker readmes correctly describe current Wave70/deferred layers, but a simple reader of Plan/PROJECT_MANIFEST.json could infer stale active wave state.
findings.recommended_action: During normal manifest maintenance, align legacy wave_current/latest_wave wording with the current control layer or explicitly mark those fields as historical.

findings.finding: Hydration top sections contain blanket stop language for eye-family generation/proof, but later sections and actual tracker rows include source-repaired local generated-output proof for mf70_eyebrows v3 and mf70_pupils_iris_sclera v3.
findings.boundary: The tracker status remains fail-closed: Wave70 CSV rows counted 122 Required_Not_Complete, 17 Blocked_Wave70_Mask_Promotion_Gate_Not_Passed, and 2 Blocked_Local_Source_Region_Not_Visible. This is stale steering language, not false completion state.
findings.recommended_action: Update hydration top summaries only; do not weaken the Wave70 hard-gate or promote rows.

findings.finding: CURRENT_PURSUING_GOAL and NEXT_ACTION start with the 2026-07-07T23:06:33 eye-boundary diagnostic even though later 2026-07-08 entries show narrower row-specific repair/proof progress.
findings.recommended_next_action: Set next action to the latest unresolved row-specific hard gate, likely source-derived/manual-trace work for still-disputed eye-family rows or explicit promotion-gate proof for repaired rows, not the old blanket diagnostic.

correction_reason: Findings are actionable but not critical enough to edit project instructions under the shared correction policy.
next_recommended_action: Refresh hydration top summaries during normal maintenance so the active next action reflects latest row-specific Wave70 hard-gate state; do not rerun Wave65 and do not start EC2 for this audit.
